nodes.label: Publication
nodes.name: Structural Pharmacology Engine (SPE): Deterministic PK Feasibility Gating for Drug Repurposing

attributes.running_title: SPE — Deterministic PK Gating for Drug Repurposing

nodes.label: Publication
nodes.name: Low-FAP/High-CXCL10 transcriptional state identifies a favorable-survival HGSOC subgroup across 16 pooled cohorts

nodes.label: Publication
nodes.name: A Configurable Timing Engine for Ovarian Cancer Treatment History Analysis: Development, Internal Verification, and External Validation

nodes.label: Capability
nodes.name: SPE Pharmacokinetic Feasibility Gate

attributes.what_it_does: Deterministic pre-filter that computes gap ratio (IC50 / free plasma Cmax) and classifies drug-repurposing candidates PASS(<5x)/CONDITIONAL(5-50x)/FAIL(>50x) in <1ms, before any efficacy scoring.
attributes.cannot_do: Does NOT establish efficacy. A PASS means exposure is physically achievable, NOT that the drug works. FAIL rules out on exposure grounds only. Not a clinical recommendation.

nodes.label: Capability
nodes.name: Low-FAP/High-CXCL10 HGSOC Prognostic Fingerprint

attributes.what_it_does: Binary, platform-portable transcriptional fingerprint (FAP below and CXCL10 above within-cohort means) that marks a favorable-overall-survival HGSOC subgroup (24.4% of patients).
attributes.validated_on: MetaGxOvarian 16 pooled cohorts n=2446: cohort-stratified Cox HR=0.7208 (95% CI 0.6282-0.8270, p=3.05e-6); per-cohort 11/16 concordant (Stouffer z=2.32, p=0.0202)
attributes.cannot_do: PROGNOSTIC ONLY, NOT PREDICTIVE. Does not predict response to any specific therapy. External validation on GSE32062 DID NOT HOLD (logrank p=0.929). Selection use requires prospective, treatment-stratified testing on the intended endpoint.

nodes.label: Capability
nodes.name: Configurable Ovarian Treatment-Timing Engine (PFI)

attributes.what_it_does: Standardizes platinum-free-interval (PFI) and treatment-timing computation from structured treatment history using explicit operational definitions, enabling consistent platinum-sensitivity categorization.
attributes.validated_on: Internal 95.6% exact-day agreement (262/274) vs Villalobos TCGA-OV; external vs ARIEL3 (n=375) distributions not different (chi2 p=0.12) but TOST equivalence narrowly missed (p=0.073)
attributes.cannot_do: Internal verification confirms algorithmic CONSISTENCY, not clinical validity. External equivalence is INCONCLUSIVE (underpowered), NOT a positive equivalence result. Not a clinical decision system.

nodes.label: ValidationResult
nodes.name: HGSOC fingerprint pooled Cox (POSITIVE, discovery)

nodes.label: ValidationResult
nodes.name: HGSOC per-cohort meta-analysis (concordant)

attributes.statistic: 11/16 cohorts FAVORABLE; Stouffer z=2.3219, two-sided p=0.0202; sign-test p=0.1051 (n.s.)

nodes.label: ValidationResult
nodes.name: HGSOC fingerprint GSE32062 external validation (NEGATIVE)

attributes.statistic: Tiered OS separation logrank p=0.9292; validation_holds=FALSE; discovery thresholds (not refit); n=260 GPL6480

nodes.label: ValidationResult
nodes.name: Timing engine internal verification vs Villalobos TCGA-OV

nodes.label: ValidationResult
nodes.name: Timing engine external validation vs ARIEL3 (INCONCLUSIVE)

attributes.statistic: PFI distributions not statistically different (chi2 p=0.12); TOST equivalence +/-10pp narrowly missed (p=0.073); 4.5pp diff below 8pp power threshold

nodes.label: ValidationResult
nodes.name: SPE vs LLM PK-reasoning benchmark

attributes.statistic: Cohere command-r-08-2024: 36% verdict accuracy (5/14); missed 3/6 impossible; falsely rejected 6/8 viable; fabricated PK params 100% of queries; SPE deterministic <1ms

nodes.label: GovernanceItem
nodes.name: SPE gap-ratio is a FEASIBILITY pre-filter, NOT efficacy proof

attributes.guardrail_text: A PASS verdict means cytotoxic free plasma concentration is physically achievable at tolerated dose; it does NOT mean the drug is efficacious. A FAIL rules out a candidate on exposure grounds only. SPE must never be cited as evidence a drug works.

nodes.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)

nodes.label: GovernanceItem
nodes.name: HGSOC fingerprint is PROGNOSTIC, not PREDICTIVE

attributes.guardrail_text: HR=0.7208 describes survival under heterogeneous standard-of-care. It does NOT predict response to any specific therapy. Any patient-selection or treatment-assignment claim requires prospective, treatment-stratified validation on the intended endpoint. Never state the fingerprint 'predicts response' or 'selects patients for [drug]'.

nodes.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)

nodes.label: GovernanceItem
nodes.name: HGSOC fingerprint external validation on GSE32062 DID NOT HOLD

attributes.guardrail_text: GSE32062 tiered OS separation was non-significant (logrank p=0.929, validation_holds=false) using transferred discovery thresholds. The favorable-survival claim is a pooled-discovery finding awaiting successful external replication; do not present it as externally validated.

nodes.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)

nodes.label: GovernanceItem
nodes.name: Timing engine internal verification = CONSISTENCY, not clinical validity

attributes.guardrail_text: 95.6% exact-day agreement confirms the engine reproduces a reference PFI derivation (algorithmic consistency). It is NOT evidence of clinical validity or outcome prediction. The ARIEL3 external comparison is equivalence-INCONCLUSIVE (TOST p=0.073, underpowered), NOT a positive equivalence result.

nodes.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)

nodes.label: GovernanceItem
nodes.name: Publication-derived capabilities are Research Use Only (RUO)

attributes.guardrail_text: The HGSOC fingerprint and timing engine are computational/retrospective and RUO; they are not clinical decision support and do not predict individual patient outcomes. RUO is a disclosure of evidence status, not a refusal to state the (cited, reproduced) quantitative findings.

nodes.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)

nodes.label: GovernanceItem
nodes.name: No evidence-tier inflation across publication capabilities

attributes.guardrail_text: Internal verification != external validation. Descriptive/retrospective subgroup separation != out-of-sample prediction. A failing or inconclusive validation must travel with the capability. Ingested benchmark/trial figures with reproduced=false must be labeled as reported, not re-derived.

nodes.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)
